LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SAU YUENG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SAU YUENG'S DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES CONDUCT A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A DEMURRER IS FILED. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND THE RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY SEPTEMBER 25, 2023.JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Set For Trial On Aug-05-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-28-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Jaynry W. Mak; 415-307-9783; appearing as counsel for defendant Sau Ming Yeung.

Hearing held. The court admonishes defendant's counsel for their failure to comply with CCP, Local Rules, and the court's 8/24/23 Minute Order, but does not issue an Order to Show Cause. The court adopts it's tentative ruling regarding defendant's demurrer as follows:

DEFENDANT SAU YUENG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Defendants must file an answer no later than January 8, 2023. Complaint states sufficient facts and is not uncertain.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-14-2023 Continued To Dec-28-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

RE: DEFENDANT SAU YUENG's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Transferred to be heard in department 501 on December 28, 2023. That department handles all nuisance/landlord-tenant matters per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Please immediately provide courtesy copies of all filings to that department with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.

Richard B. Ulmer, Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2023 Continued To Jan-31-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2023 Continued To Nov-08-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SAU YUENG'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT. Sau Yueng's demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and the response to the complaint is now due by September 25, 2023.Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
